ratingDrivers.description: Replay behavior after an interrupted write is unspecified and untested.
Contract tests cover debit, credit, refund, and reversal sign semantics, and all sampled records match caller intent.

localAnalysis.rationale: Sign semantics are proven, but the unspecified interrupted-write replay path holds correctness at minimum.
